{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = The Elder's Eyes
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Elder's Eyes]] is the symbol of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Elder]]’s Eyes is a crest featuring a nest of tentacles overlaid by six inhuman eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
